productDisplayName: Nike Men White Zoom Vomero Sports Shoes
description: Style NotePerfect for underpronators and runners with a natural gait, the nike Zoom Vomero+ 7 has lightweight cushioning as its predecessors, but with a better Fit and support. With a Gender specific midfoot and elasticated mesh panels that lock the foot in place, it supports all phases of your run. Being a Nike+ range shoe, you can add on compatible iPod nanos, Sports watches, sport bands and others from the Nike+ range and clock your runs, calories, track your routes and more.Product DetailsBlunt toed sports shoeHeavily meshed upper with elasticated mesh panels on the forefoot and mouth, and fixed panels on the sides and backfoot for maximum ventilation and to lock the fit in place to create an adaptable fitSynthetic overlays with swoosh branding on the sides for shoe structurePadded sockliner for in-step comfort with lace-up system with cushioned tongue for snug fitNike Zoom 7+ units in the forefoot and heel for responsive cushioningFull length Cushlon midsole for lightweight comfort, impact protection and durabilityBlown rubber outsole with BRS 1000 crash pad in the heel for efficient stride and maximum cushioningMultiple rubber and traction patterns offering a smooth strideGender specific flex grooves for improved flexibility and a more natural range of motion offering a seamless heel to toe transitionMaterial and CareSyntheticUse a damp cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
